## Checklist
- [ ] No `console.log` in production code paths
- [ ] No API keys or credentials in code or comments
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md entry added under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] New UI elements have ARIA labels (NFR-A-01)
- [ ] User content not sent to external servers beyond keyword strings (NFR-S-01)
- [ ] Gap bar updates correctly if keyword counts change (FR-GB-01)
- [ ] Sticky note overlay tested at boundary timestamps (E5-US22)
